description_long: This is a whimsical elf doll standing upright on a round black base. The doll features a pink dress with a white belt, matching pink gloves, and curled-toe pink shoes with green and white striped socks. Its face is pale with large, expressive eyes, pointed ears, and a small, friendly smile. The doll wears a pointed pink hat with a white trim, and its hands rest confidently on its hips. The overall design is playful and festive, reminiscent of holiday or fantasy themes, and the surface appears smooth and slightly matte.
description: A festive elf doll in a pink dress and hat, standing on a black base with hands on hips and a friendly expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, pink dress, gloves, hat, and shoes, with hands on hips and a confident stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, pointed ear, and the curled tip of the hat and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, dress, and shoes, with arms akimbo and the white belt visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, ear, and the doll's posture with hands on hips.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic holiday elf attire with a short-sleeved pink dress, white belt, pink gloves, curled-toe pink shoes, green and white striped socks, and a pointed pink hat with white trim. The style is playful and festive, reminiscent of Christmas or fantasy elf costumes.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both hands resting on hips, elbows bent outward, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with wide, open eyes and slightly raised eyebrows, conveying a friendly and cheerful demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight hair in a light pinkish-red color, mostly covered by the pointed hat.
